# daytona_admin_regenerate_user_key_pair (Action)

Regenerates a Daytona user's key pair using Daytona admin APIs.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) Daytona user ID whose key pair should be regenerated.
